overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a neon-lit covered night market. The player walks past a futuristic motorcycle, through a narrow market corridor with hanging merchandise and red paper lanterns, encounters NPCs including one lying on the ground, and circles around a character in a distinctive blue jacket before returning to the motorcycle.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alley entrance with neon signage and parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered alleyway toward a market area, passing a futuristic motorcycle on the right

entered.detail: metal door with bright cyan neon light above and 'TOILETS' signage
large illuminated advertisement screen hanging from the ceiling showing colorful graphics
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging from the ceiling
sleek red and black motorcycle with glowing wheels parked in the corridor
wooden market structure with various goods in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway illuminated by cyan and red neon lights. A futuristic motorcycle is parked in the center path while a toilets door with bright signage stands to the right. The player walks forward past the motorcycle, which moves to the left side of the frame, approaching a market area with hanging red lanterns visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with hanging merchandise and stalls

events.description: body of a person becomes visible lying on the wet ground near the merchandise racks

agents.ego_description: walking through the market corridor passing hanging clothes and cardboard boxes, approaching a group of NPCs near the stalls

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing near the market stalls at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: metal rack with various jackets and garments hanging under fluorescent lighting
stacked cardboard boxes and crates piled along the left wall
person lying face down on the wet concrete floor near the merchandise

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered market, the corridor narrows with clothes hanging on racks to the right and stacked cardboard boxes to the left. A body lies on the wet ground near the center path. The player approaches a group of NPCs standing near the market stalls at the end of the corridor, while the motorcycle becomes visible only in the far distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: market interior with NPC confrontation and industrial piping

events.description: camera begins circling clockwise around a character in a blue jacket standing against the wall
camera stops circling and moves back toward the entrance area

agents.ego_description: circling around an NPC in a blue jacket to examine their outfit and details, then turning back toward the motorcycle

notable_agents.action: character in blue jacket with red accents and helmet standing still against the wall
tattooed character with red hair and patterned jacket walking away from the camera

entered.detail: character wearing a distinctive blue leather jacket with red trim and a helmet with red crest
industrial metal safety railing along the right wall
the same red and black motorcycle now seen from the opposite direction as the player loops back

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a group of NPCs including a character with red hair and another with their hands raised. The camera circles clockwise around a prominent NPC wearing a blue jacket with red accents and a helmet, examining them from multiple angles. After the inspection, the player turns back toward the entrance, with the futuristic motorcycle coming back into view as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit covered alleyway that narrows into a crowded market before circling back to its starting point. It begins by moving past a futuristic motorcycle and a brightly signed restroom door under a glow of cyan and red neon lights. As the camera pushes deeper into the market, the space tightens between racks of hanging clothes and stacked cardboard boxes, passing a body lying on the wet ground. The scene then opens into a small gathering of NPCs, where the camera circles clockwise around a character in a blue jacket with red accents and a helmet to examine them from multiple angles. Finally, the player turns away from the group and retreats toward the entrance, bringing the futuristic motorcycle back into view.
